description: Pupil writes working JavaScript when Python was asked — logic marks only; style mark withheld. Expect 2/3 with language mismatch noted.

part.prompt: Write a Python function even_count(numbers) that returns how many values in a list are even.

markPoints.text: Iterate over every value in the list
Check whether a value is even using modulo
Written using valid Python syntax as required

questionStem: A programmer needs to count even numbers in a list.
